Jan van Goyen

6 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Fishing Boats off an Estuary
by Jan van Goyen
Netherlands · 17th Century · 1633 · Oil on panel
Panoramic View of the Spaarne
by Jan van Goyen
Dutch Golden Age · 1644
An enormous sky and a low horizon — Haarlem on the right, a windmill on the left, the flat world between them. The template for every Dutch landscape that came after.
View of Emmerich
by Jan van Goyen
Netherlands · 1645 · oil on wood
A Dune Landscape
by Jan van Goyen
Netherlands · 1650–1651 · Black chalk
A Romanesque Ruin
by Jan van Goyen
Netherlands · 1650–1651 · Black chalk
Market near a Canal
by Jan van Goyen
Netherlands · 1651 · Black crayon and brush and brown and gray washes on ivory laid paper
